name: Dolph Trading Bot
postStartCommand: bash -c 'chown -R dolph_user:dolph_user /home/dolph_user && cd /home/dolph_user/Dolph && . /opt/venv/bin/activate && git config --global user.email "4086177+paramarco@users.noreply.github.com" && git config --global user.name "paramarco" && rm -f /tmp/ssh-agent-dolph.sock && eval $(ssh-agent -a /tmp/ssh-agent-dolph.sock -s) && ssh-add /home/dolph_user/.ssh/id_ed25519'
